---
title: "GAP Status Maps"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  cwd <- getwd()
  project_root <- if (basename(cwd) == "scripts") {
    normalizePath(file.path(cwd, ".."), mustWork = FALSE)
  } else if (basename(cwd) == "2026-02_gap-maps") {
    normalizePath(cwd, mustWork = FALSE)
  } else {
    normalizePath(file.path(cwd, "projects", "2026-02_gap-maps"), mustWork = FALSE)
  }
  project_lib <- file.path(project_root, ".Rlib")
  if (dir.exists(project_lib)) .libPaths(c(project_lib, .libPaths()))
  library(sf)
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(leaflet)
  library(knitr)
})

csv_path <- file.path(project_root, "data", "cassn_gap_status.csv")
if (!file.exists(csv_path)) stop("Run 01_extract_gap_status.R first: ", csv_path)

sites_df <- read_csv(csv_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

org_group_map <- c(CDFW = "CDFW", UCNRS = "NRS", CSU = "CSU", TNC = "TNC", Pepperwood = "Pepperwood")
org_levels    <- c("CDFW", "NRS", "CSU", "TNC", "Pepperwood")
gap_levels    <- c("GAP 1", "GAP 2", "GAP 3", "GAP 4", "No Data")

sites_df <- sites_df %>%
  mutate(
    org_group = factor(org_group_map[organization], levels = org_levels),
    gap_label = factor(
      ifelse(is.na(gap_status), "No Data", paste0("GAP ", gap_status)),
      levels = gap_levels
    )
  )

sites_sf <- st_as_sf(sites_df, coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326)

gap_palette <- c(
  "GAP 1"   = "#0B6E4F",
  "GAP 2"   = "#F2C300",
  "GAP 3"   = "#F28E1C",
  "GAP 4"   = "#C81D25",
  "No Data" = "#AAAAAA"
)

pal <- colorFactor(
  palette = unname(gap_palette[gap_levels]),
  levels  = gap_levels
)
```

## All Sites Table

```{r}
sites_df %>%
  select(Organization = organization, `Site Name` = site_name, `GAP Status` = gap_label) %>%
  arrange(Organization, `Site Name`) %>%
  knitr::kable()
```

## GAP Map — All Sites

```{r}
leaflet(sites_sf) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    radius      = 5,
    stroke      = FALSE,
    fillOpacity = 0.85,
    fillColor   = ~pal(gap_label),
    popup       = ~paste0(
      "<b>", site_name, "</b><br>",
      "Org: ", organization, " (", org_group, ")<br>",
      "GAP: ", gap_label
    )
  ) %>%
  addLegend("bottomright", pal = pal, values = ~gap_label, title = "GAP Status")
```

## By Organization

```{r results='asis'}
for (og in org_levels) {
  og_df <- sites_df %>% filter(org_group == og)
  og_sf <- sites_sf %>% filter(org_group == og)

  cat("\n\n###", og, "\n\n")

  cat(
    knitr::kable(
      og_df %>%
        select(Organization = organization, `Site Name` = site_name, `GAP Status` = gap_label) %>%
        arrange(Organization, `Site Name`),
      caption = paste("Sites —", og)
    ),
    sep = "\n"
  )

  cat("\n\n")

  leaf <- leaflet(og_sf) %>%
    addTiles() %>%
    addCircleMarkers(
      radius      = 5,
      stroke      = FALSE,
      fillOpacity = 0.85,
      fillColor   = ~pal(gap_label),
      popup       = ~paste0(
        "<b>", site_name, "</b><br>",
        "Org: ", organization, "<br>",
        "GAP: ", gap_label
      )
    ) %>%
    addLegend("bottomright", pal = pal, values = ~gap_label, title = "GAP Status")

  print(htmltools::tagList(leaf))
  cat("\n\n")
}
```
